channel.title: Platform-Engineering on ivomarino.com
channel.description: Recent content in Platform-Engineering on ivomarino.com

item.title: Production Security Updates Without Downtime: Debian, FreeBSD, and OpenBSD
item.description: Security patches can’t wait, but unplanned reboots break production. The update runbook for Debian, FreeBSD, and OpenBSD — with real scripts, hold patterns, and a zero-downtime cluster update sequence.

item.title: From Data Science to Production: MLOps CI/CD Pipeline with Real-time Accuracy Monitoring
item.description: Production machine learning requires more than training good models. This guide covers building a complete MLOps system with Kubernetes, Prometheus monitoring, and automated accuracy checks to catch model drift and prevent silent failures in production.

item.title: 2026 Relaunch: Infrastructure Lessons from 10+ Years Running Production
item.description: Relaunching with a focus on pragmatic infrastructure: backup strategies, Kubernetes autoscaling, and lessons from 10+ years of production operations.
